scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-serif
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-serif
scale.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-bold font-sans

buttons.primary: bg-[#C85A40] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3.5 hover:bg-[#A84A33] transition-colors shadow-sm font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#2D2823] border border-[#E5DFD3] rounded-full px-8 py-3.5 hover:bg-[#F0EBE1] transition-colors font-medium

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-[#F0EBE1]
cards.activity: flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-5 bg-white rounded-2xl p-5 border border-[#F0EBE1] hover:border-[#C85A40]/30 transition-all shadow-sm group cursor-pointer
cards.day_card: mb-8 bg-transparent sm:bg-white sm:rounded-3xl sm:p-8 sm:shadow-sm sm:border border-[#E5DFD3]
cards.trip_card: relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl group cursor-pointer bg-white border border-[#E5DFD3]

chat_bubbles.ai: bg-white border border-[#E5DFD3] rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm p-5 text-[#2D2823] shadow-sm font-sans
chat_bubbles.user: bg-[#F0EBE1] rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm p-5 text-[#2D2823] font-sans

components.smart_hack_chip: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 bg-[#E8F0EA] text-[#2A4533] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold hover:bg-[#D4E0D7] transition-colors cursor-pointer border border-[#C6D8CB]
components.map_marker: bg-[#2D2823] text-white w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-md border-2 border-white font-bold text-sm
components.navigation_rail: fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen w-20 flex flex-col items-center py-8 bg-white border-r border-[#E5DFD3] gap-8 z-50 transition-all

split_panel.container: flex h-screen w-full bg-[#FAF8F5] overflow-hidden pl-0 lg:pl-20
split_panel.chat_panel: w-full md:w-[45%] h-full flex flex-col border-r border-[#E5DFD3] bg-white relative
split_panel.itinerary_panel: hidden md:flex w-[55%] h-full bg-[#FAF8F5] flex-col overflow-y-auto relative

hero_landing.description: Emotional vintage travel landscape for landing hero

instructions_to_main_agent.overall: Implement Memento frontend. Use Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy (Light). Emphasize editorial feel with Playfair Display for headings and Outfit for body. Use large margins and padding. Do not use generic Inter font or purple/teal gradients. Add fonts to index.html or global CSS.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout_split_panel: For the '/chat' route: Desktop must use a split-panel layout: 40-45% width for chat, 55-60% for itinerary right panel. On mobile, itinerary should be a toggleable sliding pane or stack. Include a 'Pre-generation Confirmation card' inside the chat and 'Progress indicator' logic mock.
instructions_to_main_agent.intake_flow: Implement dual-mode intake. A wizard form (Destination, Dates, Group, Traveler-type, Trip-type, Budget) AND a Chat interface. User can toggle between them.
instructions_to_main_agent.itinerary_view: Include a Day-by-Day timeline using 'day_card' wrapper and 'activity' cards. Each activity card needs fields for Name, Time, Duration, Cost, Map Pin, and Booking Deep-Link.
instructions_to_main_agent.smart_hacks: Implement Smart Hacks strip inside the itinerary view. Use 'smart_hack_chip' styling. Make them clickable.
instructions_to_main_agent.navigation: Use a persistent left-rail nav on Desktop, shrinking to icons on tablet, and a bottom bar on Mobile. Ensure Lucide React icons are used.
instructions_to_main_agent.mock_data: Hardcode Paris trip details to populate the itinerary. Use provided images. Ensure no empty states break the layout.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing_attributes: Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links). Use kebab-case.
